name: sotas/时空幽灵
short_description: Aliens occupy the Earth, mechanize a large number of organisms on the Earth, a small number of Earth people survive, and issue resistance to it... Players need to use their weapons to destroy mechanical monsters, occupy the alien base, and call teammates to fight together
detailed_description:
Aliens occupy the Earth, mechanize a large number of organisms on the Earth, a small number of Earth people survive, and issue resistance to it...
Players need to use their weapons to destroy mechanical monsters, occupy the alien base, and call teammates to fight together
about_the_game:
Aliens occupy the Earth, mechanize a large number of organisms on the Earth, a small number of Earth people survive, and issue resistance to it...
Players need to use their weapons to destroy mechanical monsters, occupy the alien base, and call teammates to fight together
supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
